---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature request is about.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What is the current limitation or pain point?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like the feature to work.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Use Cases

Explain specific use cases or scenarios where this feature would be beneficial.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
